content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 4, 2005

Parents United of Maywood
4020 E. Slauson Avenue
Maywood, CA 90270

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-216

Dear Parents United of Maywood:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice. Your inquiry presents questions outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act")¹ and should be redirected to the Office of the Secretary of State or the Office of the Attorney General. Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice, must be declined by this agency.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:rd

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
